# Maa Protocol Observability — Data Store

**Location:** `data/observability/maa_metrics.json`
**Append-only event store.** Do not edit this file manually.

## Schema

```json
{
  "version": "1.0",
  "start_time": 1745120000.0,
  "calls": [
    { "label": "string", "agent": "string", "session_id": "string", "timestamp": "ISO8601" }
  ],
  "errors": [
    { "label": "string", "agent": "string", "session_id": "string",
      "details": "string", "stack_trace": "string (truncated 2000 chars)",
      "timestamp": "ISO8601" }
  ],
  "latency": [
    { "label": "string", "agent": "string", "session_id": "string",
      "value_ms": 1234.5, "timestamp": "ISO8601" }
  ],
  "tasks": [
    { "label": "string", "agent": "string", "session_id": "string",
      "status": "start|completed|failed|waiting", "timestamp": "ISO8601" }
  ]
}
```

## Label Conventions

Use `{agent}.{action}` format for all labels:

| Agent | Examples |
|---|---|
| `sneha` | `sneha.send_email`, `sneha.read_inbox`, `sneha.draft_reply` |
| `email_ops` | `email_ops.pipeline_run`, `email_ops.format_html`, `email_ops.verify_sent` |
| `research` | `research.article_fetch`, `research.investment_analysis`, `research.blog_draft` |
| `voice` | `voice.transcribe`, `voice.tts_generate` |
| `whatsapp` | `whatsapp.handle_dm`, `whatsapp.send_voice` |
| `orchestrator` | `orchestrator.spawn`, `orchestrator.validate`, `orchestrator.escalate` |

## Commands

```bash
# Record events
python3 ops/observability/maa_metrics.py record --type call --label "sneha.send_email" --agent sneha
python3 ops/observability/maa_metrics.py record --type error --label "research.fetch_failed" --details "HTTP 404" --agent research
python3 ops/observability/maa_metrics.py record --type latency --label "sneha.send_email" --value 1342 --agent sneha
python3 ops/observability/maa_metrics.py record --type task --label "market_brief.generate" --status completed --agent orchestrator

# View
python3 ops/observability/maa_metrics.py dashboard          # ASCII dashboard
python3 ops/observability/maa_metrics.py summary            # Plain summary
python3 ops/observability/maa_metrics.py summary --since 24 # Last 24h only
python3 ops/observability/maa_metrics.py resources         # Live CPU/memory/disk

# Export
python3 ops/observability/maa_metrics.py export --format json --output report.json
python3 ops/observability/maa_metrics.py export --format csv --output report.csv

# Reset
python3 ops/observability/maa_metrics.py reset --confirm   # Wipes all data
```

## Integration Points

| Script | What to Log |
|---|---|
| `ops/email/run_email_pipeline.sh` | `call` at start + end; `error` on failure; `latency` for total duration |
| `ops/research/*.py` | `call` for API fetches; `error` on failure; `latency` per article |
| `skills/market-brief/scripts/run_market_brief.py` | `task` start/completed/failed |

## Gitignore

This file should NOT be committed to git. Add to `.gitignore`:
```
data/observability/maa_metrics.json
```
